(who either disagree or are in opposition with them). ______________________________________________ Note: In ref. to "Zionist War Crimes (1)" (shown below), copy/paste the link below into a search window to see how to use, unzip and/or revert the zipped folder into it's original CDRom format. http://eta-45.blogspot.com/2012/11/holocaust-jews-treated-good-in-camps-in.html Free unzip program - link --- > http://www.7-zip.org/ ______________________________________ In ref to; “CNN International anchor (Rosemary Church) refutes Zionist spokeswoman (Miri Eisen) live on air” (video below) (I believe the video is from a 2006 report) After the very beautiful Rosemary Church questioned Israeli spokeswoman Miri Eisen live on Zionist owned CNN (ZNN) International over the Zionist State’s disproportionate responses to supposed small and ineffectual explosives being lobbed into Israel, she was immediately labeled as a “jew-hater” and “anti-semite.“ Which of course, she is neither. And as far as those “dangerous missiles” landing on Zionist soil, one should have questions there as well. One, are Palestinians really that stupid, and two, are any small explosives really being lobbed into Israel? Palestinians are a people w/o a military, and by tossing small missiles around and into a nation that not only has a full and modern military, but, several hundred nukes as well, they must more than realize there would be an Israeli response. So, are any missiles really being shot into Zionist territory? And also, how can it be ascertained for proof positive that either the Zionist government isn’t committing acts of self-terrorism as justification to destroy and secure more Palestinian lands or, that they are not outright lying about any missiles being shot into their territories altogether? And this is basically what Rosemary Church is asking. And because she dared insinuate the obvious, she became an instant “anti-semite and hater of all jews."
